name: @gh-reusable/dagger-pipelines
description: Reusable Dagger pipeline primitives for GitHub Action packaging.

scripts.test:compliance:us1: vitest run -- src/workflow-governance.test.ts src/dagger-module-integration.test.ts src/standards-defaults.test.ts src/security-workflows.test.ts src/audit-workflow.test.ts
scripts.test:compliance:us3: vitest run -- src/rust-workflow.test.ts src/release-workflows.test.ts src/security-workflows.test.ts src/workflow-governance.test.ts src/dagger-module-integration.test.ts
scripts.test:compliance: pnpm run test:compliance:us1 && pnpm run test:compliance:us2 && pnpm run test:compliance:us3
